task_completion.description: Verify the lab requisition is opened for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Maria Santos' and DOB '1975-08-22' should be visible at the top or in the patient demographic section of the Ontario Lab Requisition form.
A checked box or selected item explicitly for 'Glucose' or 'Glucose (fasting)' on the lab requisition form.
A checked box or selected item explicitly for 'HbA1c' on the lab requisition form.
A checked box or selected item explicitly for 'Lipid Profile', 'Cholesterol', or 'Lipids' on the lab requisition form.
A checked box or selected item explicitly for 'Creatinine' on the lab requisition form.

task_completion.description: Verify the required clinical note is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Diabetes follow-up, fasting specimen' must be visible in the clinical details, notes, or comments text field of the requisition.

task_completion.description: Verify the requisition is submitted or completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen, a generated PDF of the completed requisition, or the requisition appearing as a saved document in the patient's eChart.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR interface, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual lab requisition form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The form should look like the standard Ontario Lab Requisition within OSCAR EMR, not a generic text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually clicked through the form rather than manipulating the DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show a logical progression of clicking individual checkboxes and typing text, rather than the final completed state appearing instantly in a single step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos (DOB: 1975-08-22). Required tests to be selected on the Ontario Lab Requisition: Glucose (fasting), HbA1c, Lipid Profile/Cholesterol, and Creatinine. Required clinical note text: 'Diabetes follow-up, fasting specimen'. OSCAR EMR credentials: oscardoc / oscar / 1117.
